title: lessingia lemmonii var. ramulosissima
intro: Lessingia lemmonii var. ramulosissima, also known as Ramusless Mountain Fiddleneck, is a variety of the Lessingia lemmonii plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lessingia lemmonii var. ramulosissima include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
